ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 66 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenVPN/openvpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn
Language: c
OpenVPN is an open source VPN daemon

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RfidResearchGroup/proxmark3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RfidResearchGroup/proxmark3
Language: c
Iceman Fork - Proxmark3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: brunodev85/winlator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator
Language: c
Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cilium/tetragon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cilium/tetragon
Language: c
eBPF-based Security Observability and Runtime Enforcement

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorianborian/sesame-robot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorianborian/sesame-robot
Language: c
An open and affordable mini quadruped robot based on ESP32.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jqlang/jq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jqlang/jq
Language: c
Command-line JSON processor

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kingToolbox/WindTerm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kingToolbox/WindTerm
Language: c
A professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Shell/Telnet/Tmux/Serial terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libsdl-org/SDL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL
Language: c
Simple DirectMedia Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: c
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: osaurus-ai/osaurus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/osaurus-ai/osaurus
Language: c
Own your AI. The native macOS harness for AI agents -- any model, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity. Built in Swift. Fully offline. Open source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbatard/rufus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbatard/rufus
Language: c
The Reliable USB Formatting Utility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: radareorg/radare2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raysan5/raylib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raysan5/raylib
Language: c
A simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: signalwire/freeswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/signalwire/freeswitch
Language: c
FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a versatile software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. From a Raspberry PI to a multi-core server, FreeSWITCH can unlock the telecommunications potential of any device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ventoy/Ventoy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ventoy/Ventoy
Language: c
A new bootable USB solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: veracrypt/VeraCrypt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/veracrypt/VeraCrypt
Language: c
Disk encryption with strong security based on TrueCrypt
